coordinate_system: Tschamut LPS local horizontal coordinates; elevations are EnviDat LPS terrain heights shifted by -1600 m for consistency with overview data.

terrain_proxy.equation: z_m = slope_x * x_m + slope_y * y_m + intercept_m
terrain_proxy.note: This is a transparent v0 proxy terrain fitted to public LPS terrain points. It is not an official field DEM and must not be interpreted as calibrated terrain reconstruction.
